file_insights.changes: Transformed from stub endpoints (2 endpoints returning not_implemented) to fully implemented validation API (3 endpoints with complete logic)
key_additions: Added comprehensive imports for FastAPI, SQLModel, logging, and schema models
Implemented POST /validate/{content_id} with version snapshot creation and validation workflow
Implemented GET /history/{content_id} with database query and record retrieval
Implemented GET /status with service availability checking
Added _record_to_response helper function for model transformation
technical_decisions: Uses JSON serialization for storing complex objects (flags, citations) in database
Creates ContentVersion snapshot before validation for audit trail
Updates ContentStatus to VALIDATED after successful validation
Uses SQLModel select() with ordering for history retrieval

file_insights.changes: Added validation service dependency injection with provider strategy pattern
key_additions: Dual provider initialization: NotebookLMProvider (primary) and FallbackValidationProvider (fallback)
Graceful error handling during provider initialization with logging
ValidationServiceDep annotated type for FastAPI dependency injection
technical_decisions: Primary/fallback provider pattern for high availability
Try-except blocks per provider to prevent cascade failures
Fallback assignment: if primary fails, fallback becomes both primary and fallback

patterns_discovered.name: Dependency Injection
patterns_discovered.description: Uses FastAPI Depends with Annotated types for injecting SessionDep and ValidationServiceDep into endpoints

patterns_discovered.name: Provider Strategy Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Primary and fallback validation providers with automatic fallback if primary unavailable

patterns_discovered.name: Data Transformation Pipeline
patterns_discovered.description: Helper function _record_to_response converts domain models (ValidationRecord) to API response schemas

patterns_discovered.name: Version Snapshots
patterns_discovered.description: Creates ContentVersion records before validation to maintain audit trail of content state at validation time

patterns_discovered.name: JSON Serialization for Complex Fields
patterns_discovered.description: Stores complex objects (flags, citations) as JSON strings in database, parsed back to objects in responses
locations: validation.py validation endpoint and response transformation

patterns_discovered.name: Graceful Degradation
patterns_discovered.description: Exception handling during provider initialization logs warnings but doesn't crash, with fallback logic

gotchas_discovered.description: Citations stored as JSON string requires parsing with json.loads() in _record_to_response; inconsistent with flags which is also stored as JSON
gotchas_discovered.impact: Easy to forget JSON serialization when adding new complex fields
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider using JSONField or custom serializer base class

gotchas_discovered.description: If primary provider fails, fallback is used as both primary AND fallback, creating identical references
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unclear behavior if same provider instance is used twice with different expectations
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider using provider factory pattern or explicit fallback chain

gotchas_discovered.description: GET /history/{content_id} returns all records without pagination or limits
gotchas_discovered.impact: Large validation histories could cause memory issues and slow responses
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add offset/limit parameters or cursor-based pagination

gotchas_discovered.description: ContentStatus updated to VALIDATED without explicit validation of current state
gotchas_discovered.impact: No safeguards against invalid state transitions (e.g., validating already deleted content)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add state machine validation or check existing status before update

gotchas_discovered.description: POST /validate/{content_id} has no body schema or validation parameters
gotchas_discovered.impact: Client has no way to provide validation options or parameters
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Define optional ValidationRequest schema for configuration

approach_details.objective: Implement validation API endpoints (POST /validate, GET /history, GET /status) with service injection and version snapshots
completed_tasks: Transformed 2 stub endpoints into 3 fully functional endpoints
Integrated ValidationService with primary/fallback provider pattern
Implemented version snapshot creation before validation
Added proper error handling and HTTP status codes

recommendations.recommendation: Add pagination to GET /history endpoint with limit/offset or cursor-based approach
recommendations.rationale: Prevents memory exhaustion and slow responses for contents with many validations

recommendations.recommendation: Define ValidationRequest schema for POST /validate body to support validation parameters
recommendations.rationale: Allows clients to configure validation options (strictness, specific checks, etc.)

recommendations.recommendation: Add timeout handling for validation_service.validate() calls
recommendations.rationale: External validation services may hang; timeouts prevent indefinite request waiting

recommendations.recommendation: Validate content state before updating to VALIDATED (check not already deleted/archived)
recommendations.rationale: Prevents invalid state transitions and data consistency issues

recommendations.recommendation: Add structured logging for validation start, completion, and errors
recommendations.rationale: Improves debugging and monitoring of validation service reliability

recommendations.recommendation: Create base serializer or use SQLModel JSONField for consistent JSON field handling
recommendations.rationale: Reduces duplication and improves maintainability of complex field serialization
